use_cases: User authentication and login flow for web applications
Split-screen layout showcasing branding on the left and login form on the right
Standard email and password entry with remember me functionality
Navigation between sign-in and sign-up pages
Password visibility toggle for improved user experience
ai_summary: A professional split-screen login page featuring a gradient dark background with branding on the left and a clean white form panel on the right. Includes email/password inputs, remember me checkbox, password visibility toggle, and navigation to sign-up. Designed for SaaS applications requiring user authentication.
